# Abhishek Kaushik — developerabhishek.live

> Independent engineer building agent-native software. AI systems for businesses that haven't met AI yet.

This file follows the [llmstxt.org](https://llmstxt.org) format. It gives agents the shortest path to useful context without crawling the site.

## About

- Role: AI engineer, ~6 years experience
- Focus: Modular monoliths, retrieval systems, and operational AI for Indian MSMEs and mid-market teams
- Anchor project: Neev — a modular-monolith platform for MSME textile distribution

## Case studies

- [Neev](https://developerabhishek.live/work/neev): Modular monolith, multi-tenant, tenant_id as a first-class invariant
- [VeriCite](https://developerabhishek.live/work/vericite): Institutional RAG on top of Hugging Face TEI + Qdrant
- [Bluehost Agents Framework](https://developerabhishek.live/work/bluehost-agents): Agent runtime powering Bluehost AI features
- [curat.money](https://developerabhishek.live/work/curat-money): Product-engineering framing, financial data
